5.2.title: Visible Claim and Evidence Alignment
5.2.summary: Checks whether surface-level claims are supported by explicit evidence available to the evaluator. Flags claims that overstate, imply, or conceal evidence boundaries.

9.1.title: Section Reference Normalization and Resolution
9.1.summary: Defines how framework section references should be normalized, resolved, and reported. Supports equivalent forms such as §9.1, 9.1, and Section 9.1.

14.5.title: Cross-Document Attribution Verification
14.5.summary: Validates citations, section references, and cross-document claims against an available section index or source corpus. Unresolved attributions should be reported rather than inferred.

18.10.title: Hidden Substrate and Metadata Inspection
18.10.summary: Requires auditors to consider hidden or semi-hidden document substrates such as embedded text, metadata, form fields, annotations, alt text, attachments, and barcode payloads when available.

23.3.title: Round-N Report Format and Severity Gate
23.3.summary: Defines the canonical round report structure and finding format. Findings are expressed as severity, section reference, message, and location, with threshold-based blocking.
